title: Luugro
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Luugro2.png]] |name=Luugro |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3956 BBY]], [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which includes Luugro's [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], in [[3956 BBY]]. |species=[[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |gender= |pronouns=He/him{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Green |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|''«''The only way you'll collect that bounty is over our cold, dead bodies!''»
"''That's the plan.|quotestart=0|Luugro confronts Calo Nord|}} '''Luugro''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] present on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]. He had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], green skin, wore a red, white, and brown [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] with a black [[Harness/Legends|harness]] and [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. Luugro understood [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and spoke [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]]. In [[3956 BBY]], Luugro and his [[Luugro's partner|Rodian partner]] had [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] put out for them. While the Rodians were in a [[Lower City]] [[Lower City Apartments|apartment complex]] on Taris, they were followed and confronted by the famed [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Calo Nord]], seeking to claim the bounties. Luugro's partner recognized Nord and warned him, while Nord informed them of the bounties. Luugro stated that Nord would have to collect it over their [[Death/Legends|dead]] bodies. Nord retorted that it was his plan, pulled out two [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistols, and shot both Rodians, killing them. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], a former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] with the memories of a [[Republic soldier]], witnessed the confrontation. ==Behind the scenes== Luugro first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. He appears in an unavoidable cutscene when the player enters one of the apartment rings in the Taris's Lower City. The player cannot directly interact with Luugro, and no actions regarding him will change alignment or progress plots or quests. Game files from ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'' list Luugro as being of both male and female [[Gender/Legends|gender]]. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Luugro |pl=Luugro |fi=Luugro }} [[Category:Assassins]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Rodians]] [[Category:Tarisians]]
